indications_and_usage: Use(s) For the temporary relief of pain and itching associated with: • Sunburn • Minor burns • Insect bites • Cuts • Scrapes
dosage_and_administration: Directions Adults and children 2 years and over: • Clean the affected area • Apply a small amount of this product on the area 3 to 4 times daily • May be covered with a sterile bandage Children under 2 years: • Consult a doctor
